headline: PTC Teams with NVIDIA to Unite Design and Robotics Simulation by Connecting Onshape to NVIDIA Isaac Sim
summary: PTC (NASDAQ: PTC) today announced a new robotics design-to-simulation workflow that connects PTC's cloud-native Onshape® computer-aided design (CAD) and product data management (PDM) platform with NVIDIA Isaac Sim open simulation framework. The workflow is being introduced at NVIDIA GTC 2026 to demonstrate how teams can simulate robot designs while maintaining a single source of truth, enabling time savings, reduced errors, and accelerated development, while also supporting physical AI through d

headline: Keybanc Maintains Overweight on PTC, Lowers Price Target to $195
summary: Keybanc  analyst Jason Celino   maintains PTC (NASDAQ:PTC) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $210 to $195.

headline: Barclays Reinstates Overweight on PTC, Announces $180 Price Target
summary: Barclays  analyst Saket Kalia   reinstates PTC (NASDAQ:PTC) with a Overweight and announces $180 price target.
